name: GreenLedger
tagline: Audit-ready carbon accounting for finance and sustainability teams
niche: Carbon accounting and sustainability reporting software for mid-market companies
brand_positioning: GreenLedger helps mid-market companies stand up audit-ready greenhouse gas inventories in weeks, not months. We bridge finance and sustainability with defensible methodology, deep system integrations, and a supplier portal that scales primary data collection for Scope 3.
unique_value_props: Automated data ingestion from accounting (QuickBooks, NetSuite), ERP, utilities, and cloud platforms
AI-driven classification of spend and activity data mapped to emissions factors with evidence trails
Audit-ready reports aligned to GHG Protocol, CSRD/ESRS, CDP, SBTi, and SEC climate disclosure formats
Supplier engagement portal for collecting primary data and tracking response rates
Scenario modeling for decarbonization projects and internal carbon pricing
Transparent, finance-friendly pricing with no per-user fees

features: Scope 1/2/3 calculators with emissions factor library and versioning
Data quality scoring and audit logs for each calculation
Disclosure templates (SEC, CSRD, CDP, GRI) with one-click export
Project and initiative tracking with ROI and abatement curves
Supplier data portal with email templates and reminders
API and flat-file uploader for bulk data
Utility and energy data connectors for automated Scope 2 ingestion

pricing.model: Per-entity subscription with usage tiers; unlimited users
pricing.notes: Fast-start onboarding included; typical mid-market deployment in 30 days

proof_points: A 280-employee manufacturer moved from spreadsheets to audit-ready reporting in 6 weeks
Average 35% improvement in supplier response rates using the portal and templates
Median first-year Scope 2 data automation coverage of 85% via utility connectors
content_themes: Scope 3 data collection and supplier engagement
Emissions factor selection and data quality
CDP scoring and disclosure best practices
